name: management
description: Product and project management discipline for the NVZver marketplace. Agents: product-manager — shapes vague ideas into structured draft pitches and returns pending human gates; project-manager — stewards the roadmap, recommends what to build next with dependency/risk/value reasoning, decomposes pitches into focused epics, and stages each epic's LSA handoff. Entry points: management:start-feature (shaping) and management:roadmap (project management) — the skills run every human gate (agents propose, skills gate). Depends on core (ground-rules, output).
